HMW-V07: FM Job Detail — Simplified

With the simplified model (no legs, one pickup driver), what does the FM job detail page look like across its lifecycle?
The model is simple now. FM job = one vendor, one pickup driver, one delivery. The driver assigned in the vendor app is the driver who picks up from the origin. That's the Teleport → Vendor handoff. Everything after that (intermediate hubs, truck changes) is the vendor's internal ops. The page needs to serve: (1) Assignment — pick a driver. (2) Monitoring — did they pick up? did they deliver? (3) Reconciliation — do the fees match?

State 1: Pending — No Driver Assigned

FM Job Detail: Simple and Clean

Section order: Status Bar → Driver & Vehicle → Route → Cargo → Fees → Proofs → Activity Log

Driver assignment is two dropdowns + Assign button. After assignment, shows confirmed name + plate + phone + "Reassign" link. Locked after Completed.

Route is two points: Pickup and Delivery. Green checkmark + timestamp when completed. No timeline, no intermediate stops.

The page progresses naturally through 4 states: empty (assign driver) → assigned (awaiting pickup) → picked up (en route) → delivered (awaiting verification). Each state adds data (proofs, log entries, timestamps) without changing the layout.
